name: cognitive-fabric-demo
description: Comprehensive demo system for Cognitive Fabric Visualizer

scripts.generate-data: node -e "import('./data/sample-generator.js').then(async (m) => { const conv = await m.generateConversation({length: 15}); console.log(JSON.stringify(conv, null, 2)); })"
scripts.validate: node -e "import('./validation/demo-validator.js').then(async (m) => { const validator = new m.DemoValidator(JSON.parse(await import('fs').then(fs => fs.readFile('./scripts/config/demo-config.js', 'utf8')).then(content => content.replace('export const DEMO_CONFIG = ', '').replace(/;$/, ''))))); console.log('Validator ready'); })"

author: Cognitive Fabric Visualizer Team
